1779280.name: Humankind in a nutshell
1779280.description: Humankind in a Nutshell is a captivating 4X strategy game infused with slot mechanics. Starting from the Ancient era, players must manage their tribe's needs, fend off barbarian threats, and advance through technological research to cultivate a thriving nation. Construct a diverse array of facilities essential for growth and strategic superiority, ultimately aiming for victory.
